Small bush next to S lot, permit parking only. Berries are ripe early September. Access: Public.

Multiple highbush blueberries located right on the road. The berries are wild and smaller in size, but the soil in the area is usually reasonably wet and habitable for good blueberry production. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: July-Augus
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
